items.summary: Research on SME and intermediary awareness and use of electronic trade documents (ETDs), and how the government and industry can support their adoption.

items.title: Official Statistics: Large businesses’ payment practices and performance: Statistics (2025)
items.summary:
Annual statistics describing how large UK businesses pay their suppliers, using data reported under The Payment Practices and Performance Reporting Regulations 2017. 

Includes statistics on the number of reports submitted by businesses, the average time to pay, and the proportion of invoices paid late (by number and value).

items.title: Correspondence: Keep Britain Working review update: March 2026
items.summary: An update on the implementation of the independent review of the role of employers in tackling health based economic inactivity and promoting healthy and inclusive workplaces.

items.title: Correspondence: Keep Britain Working review update: June 2026
items.summary: June 2026 update on implementing the independent review of employers' role in tackling health based economic inactivity and promoting healthy and inclusive workplaces.

items.title: Decision: UK's steel trade measure from 1 July 2026
items.summary: Details about a new steel trade measure from 1 July 2026, which limits tariff-free steel import quota volumes.

items.title: Guidance: Domestic energy tariff reductions 2026: guidance for energy suppliers

items.summary: Funding for local authorities to deliver energy performance and low carbon heating upgrades to low-income homes in England.

items.summary: Monthly data on the number of certificates issued for generation under the Renewables Obligation.
